com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXProductionModuleAssignationResult

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXModuleAssignationResult<IXProductionModuleCode>

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXProductionModuleAssignationResult
extends IXModuleAssignationResult<IXProductionModuleCode>
    Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation of production module code
